free_text: Effect of neutron excess in the entrance channel on
the 18O + 93Nb system: An experimental study relevant
to incomplete - fusion dynamics
Bareilly College, Bareilly, U.P.
Hindu College, Moradabad, U.P.
Maulana Azad National Urdu University,
Hyderabad
Jamia Millia Islamia, New Delhi
Addis Ababa University, Ethiopia
15UD pelletron accelerator
Self-supporting target of 93Nb having thickness
~1.4-1.5 mg/cm2 and Al catcher foils of thickness
ranging from 0.8 to 1.6 mg/cm2 were prepared by a
rolling technique.
The energy resolution of the detector was found
to be 2.5 keV for 1408 keV gamma ray for standard
152Eu source.
The overall error            (<=17%)
thickness of the sample material (<1%)
efficiency calibration of detector (<2%)
fluctuations in the beam current (<2%)
dead time                       (<10%)
straggling effect of projectile (<2%)
